description: PR5 — rooming 2nd-pass reassigns an UNASSIGNED. First pass cannot fit section in available rooms at the capacity buffer; a larger room exists but the pass missed it; 2nd pass repairs. Asserts ROOMING_REPAIR_REASSIGNED emission.
notes: Demand 35, TIGHT room at raw cap 35 is rejected by the 1.1 buffer (needs 39).
ROOMY cap 60 fits. 2nd pass picks up ROOMY and repairs UNASSIGNED.
